allow_instructions: Auto-run read-only repo inspection: git status/diff/log, rg, read files, scoped pnpm typecheck/lint/test/build for the package being edited.
Auto-run ABYSS verification helpers when the mission is code change: pnpm --filter <pkg> typecheck|lint|test|build, verify-local.ps1 when scoped checks pass first.
block_instructions: Never auto-run destructive git: git reset, git clean, git push --force, history rewrite, or broad git add.
Never auto-run deployment, terraform apply/destroy, database migrations, auth changes, or CI/CD writes without explicit Chief GO in chat.
Never auto-run MCP or shell actions that expose secrets, .env values, credentials, PHI, or patient data.
Never auto-edit packages/sentra/** without explicit Chief GO — crown-jewel is review-first.
Never auto-run git push, gh pr merge, or production-impacting infra commands.
For MCP tools touching production databases, auth, billing, or external write APIs: require human approval even under Auto-review.
